label: Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives

node.label: Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives
node.definition: Policies are optimized directly, often with a learned value or critic to reduce variance and guide improvement.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives is to connect Reinforcement learning, Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives to downstream capabilities including Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF, Vision–language–action models, Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO).
examples: substrate for Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF
substrate for Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives.

dependencies.rationale: Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives uses Reinforcement learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives.
Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Policies are optimized directly, often with a learned value or critic to reduce variance and guide improvement.

The role of Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives is to connect Reinforcement learning, Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives to downstream capabilities including Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF, Vision–language–action models, Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO).
substrate for Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF
substrate for Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)

A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives.
Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives uses Reinforcement learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
